title: Karpathy Bigram explained in 10min..
summary: Caleb Writes Code presents Andrej Karpathy's bigram language model tutorial, covering tokenization, embeddings, loss functions, and optimization. The video serves as foundational material for understanding transformer-based models and GPT architectures.
writeup: The video walks through bigram language models as taught by Karpathy, covering tokenization, embeddings, loss functions, and optimization in about ten minutes. It frames bigrams as the foundation for understanding larger transformer architectures like GPT, so the mechanics carry forward. Concrete elements include softmax, backpropagation, and the AdamW optimizer applied to a simple next-token prediction setup.
